coexisting with the ocean

hero.description: Ocean Tech replaces lead weights with eco-friendly zinc fishing weights, protecting marine ecosystems while improving fishermen's operating conditions.

greenCert.description: Core certification proving Ocean Tech's eco-friendly transition

items.title: Eco-friendly Material
items.description: Zinc-based fishing weights reduce heavy metal pollution and passed SVHC non-detection verification for 235 substances.

items.title: Long Durability
items.description: With a lifespan up to ten times longer than conventional lead weights, replacement burden is significantly reduced.

items.title: Field Validation
items.description: A 31-month pilot program verified real-world usability and meaningful cost savings.

items.title: Certified Technology
items.description: Six patents, four design patents, and a major patent award demonstrate strong technical competitiveness.

compare.title: How Zinc Weights Differ from Lead Weights

cta.title:
Let's build the future
of eco-friendly fishing together
cta.description: Ocean Tech's zinc weights are already used in a SUHYUP unit-price contract product line. Switch from lead to zinc and help create a healthier ocean.
